meaning: n.犯罪,冒犯,违反,罪过,过错n.[军] 攻击
examples: A fine for this offence is automatic.
He said he didn't mean to give offence.
A first offence carries a fine of $1,000.
One of the pair, named as Andrzej S, apologised in court for the offence, Polish media report.
An Arsenal fan from Brixton, London, was arrested by football intelligence officers in connection with an earlier offence.
